title: AppRole
description: Represents a role defined by an application that can be assigned to users, groups, or service principals

id.description: Unique identifier for the app role

allowedMemberTypes.description: Specifies whether the role can be assigned to users/groups, applications, or both

displayName.description: Display name for the app role

value.description: Value that is included in the roles claim in authentication tokens

isEnabled.description: Whether the app role is enabled
